LABEL: AHRQ Clinical Classifications Software Refined (CCSR) Diagnosis 1 Category Code 

DESCRIPTION: AHRQ Clinical Classifications Software Refined (CCSR) Diagnosis Category Code. The CCSR aggregates 
International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification/Procedure Coding System 
(ICD-10-CM/PCS) codes into clinically meaningful
